problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue may resolve How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
